# Code of Conduct

This Code of Conduct governs collaboration in the `shift-hero` repository maintained by Notezy.

## Expected Behavior

- Respectful, constructive, and professional communication.
- Technical discussion focused on code quality and project goals.
- Good-faith collaboration in issues, pull requests, and reviews.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, hate speech, or personal attacks.
- Repeated disruptive behavior or bad-faith arguments.
- Publishing private information without consent.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may edit/remove content or restrict participation for violations.

## Reporting

Report concerns to: `thenotezy@gmail.com`
